nodes.label: Call an OpenAI-compatible LLM and return the response text.
Attempt to parse YAML from an LLM response.     Handles fenced code blocks and a
Calls the LLM with the current question + accumulated context.     Parses YAML r
Performs a DuckDuckGo web search using the current search_query.     Appends res
Generates a final comprehensive answer from accumulated context.     Optionally
Wire up the research agent graph and return a runnable Flow.
Run the research agent for the given question.      Args:         question:
